title: krigia cespitosa var. gracilis
intro: Krigia cespitosa var. gracilis, commonly known as the grass-leaved daisy or slender yellow-eyed grass, is a perennial plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Krigia cespitosa var. gracilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in water or oil, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
